package rulecoverage

func PositiveDeferInLoopResourceGrowth() string {
    ruleID := "defer_in_loop_resource_growth"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "defer statements inside loops that can accumulate resources until function exit."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
